summary: Thyroid hormones like thyroxine play an important role by regulating metabolism but are not as directly involved compared to other options; Epinephrine has significant effects due to stimulating vasodilation, increasing nutrients delivery while also aiding contraction processes crucial during wound healing phase making it more effective than corticosteroids or parathyroid hormone
